title: Cwr Modpack
body:
# ⚔️ CWR Lifesteal Modpack  

**CWR Lifesteal Modpack** is built for players who enjoy **competitive PvP** and **Lifesteal gameplay**. It focuses on performance, visibility, and combat clarity while keeping everything lightweight and optimized for smooth gameplay on both low-end and high-end PCs.  

## ✨ Features  

- ❤️ **Lifesteal Ready** – Perfectly tuned for Lifesteal SMPs and PvP servers.  
- 🚀 **Optimized Performance** – Includes FPS-boosting mods like Sodium, Lithium, and other client optimizations.  
- 🛡 **Armor HUD** – See your armor durability and status directly on screen.  
- 🔥 **Low Fire** – Fire takes up less screen space, making PvP easier.  
- 🪓 **Mace PvP Enhancements** – Removes **windburst particles** for clear visibility during Mace fights.  
- 🎮 **PvP Tweaks** – Clean visuals, smoother hit registration, and reduced distractions.  
- 🌍 **Multiplayer Friendly** – Designed for competitive servers and survival play.  

## ✅ Why use this Modpack?  
If you play on **Lifesteal servers** or love **PvP**, this modpack gives you:  
- Maximum FPS and smooth performance  
- Cleaner combat visuals (low fire, no windburst particles)  
- Useful HUDs for better awareness  
- A lightweight setup that works on all kinds of PCs  

Take your PvP fights to the next level with the **CWR Lifesteal Modpack**!  

---

Found a bug or need help?
